summary: A large circular amphitheater or arena structure with a brick floor, white fence perimeter, and two tall tower structures with overhanging roofs. The main arena features concentric circular walls with multiple material layers, surrounded by a decorative white block border. Two prominent towers flank the structure with dark stone walls and extended roof overhangs.

shape.overall_form: circular arena with two rectangular tower annexes
shape.symmetry: radial symmetry for main arena; bilateral symmetry for towers

rebuild_hints: Start with circular arena base using brick blocks in concentric rings
Build white fence perimeter around entire structure
Construct two towers at opposite ends using stonebrick with 1-block width walls
Add overhanging roof sections to towers using slabs and stairs
Layer internal walls with mixed materials (stone, wood, slabs) for depth
Place decorative elements (hay bales, gold blocks) on roof edges
Ensure circular shape maintains consistent radius throughout
uncertainties: Exact internal layer composition unclear from exterior views
Precise tower height and roof overhang measurements uncertain
Whether internal structures are solid or hollow
Exact block count for circular perimeter fence
Specific arrangement of internal seating/viewing areas
